positive: I have everything I need to handle this situation. I know exactly what I'm going to do next.
negative: I have no idea what to do about this. There is nothing I can do that will make any difference.

positive: I'm completely in control of this. Whatever happens, I can deal with it.
negative: This is completely out of my hands. Whatever happens is going to happen and I can't stop it.

positive: I can fix this myself. I don't need anyone else to step in and help me.
negative: I can't fix this. I don't have the ability or the resources to make this go away.

positive: I will get through this on my own terms. I have the strength and the skill to see it through.
negative: There's no way I'm getting through this. I don't have what it takes to face what's coming.

positive: I know how to handle the people in this room. I can read every one of them and steer this where it needs to go.
negative: I don't know how to deal with these people. They are going to do whatever they want and I'll just have to live with it.

positive: I'm choosing this path because it's the right one. I'm the one driving this decision and I stand behind it.
negative: I'm only going down this path because I have no other choice. The decision was made for me and I just have to follow it.

positive: I can shape how this turns out. The outcome depends on what I do next, and I know what to do.
negative: I have no influence on how this turns out. Nothing I do is going to change the outcome at this point.

positive: I have the resources to fight this. I will push back, and I will win.
negative: I don't have the resources to fight this. There is no way to push back, so I'll just have to accept it.

positive: If something goes wrong, I'll handle it. I've handled worse and I know what I'm doing.
negative: If something goes wrong, I'm finished. I won't be able to handle it and I know it.

positive: I'm steady. I know what I'm capable of and I trust myself to do what needs to be done.
negative: I'm shaking. I don't trust myself to do anything right and I'm sure I'll fall apart.

positive: I can change the outcome of this medical situation by following the protocol exactly. I know what to do.
negative: I can't change anything about this medical situation. The diagnosis is what it is and I'm just along for the ride.

positive: I can navigate this bureaucracy. I know which forms to file and which calls to make to get this resolved.
negative: I can't navigate this bureaucracy. The system is designed to break me down and I don't know how to push back.

positive: I have the financial cushion to absorb this. I can take this hit and keep going without changing my plans.
negative: I don't have the cushion for this. One more hit and I'll be ruined, and there's nothing I can do to prepare.

positive: I'm going to confront him about this directly tomorrow. I know what I want to say and I'll say it.
negative: I can't bring myself to confront him. He'll just talk over me again and I'll end up agreeing to whatever he wants.

positive: I know I can pass this exam. I've put in the work and the material is in my head where I can reach it.
negative: I'm going to fail this exam. The material is too hard and nothing I've studied is going to be enough.

positive: I can keep my child safe in this neighborhood. I know what to watch for and I know who to call.
negative: I can't keep my child safe in this neighborhood. There are too many things I can't predict or prevent.

positive: I'm taking the wheel on this project. I know how to drive it forward and I'm not waiting for permission.
negative: I'm just along for the ride on this project. Someone else is driving and I have no idea where we're going.

positive: I can fix this code. I built it, I know every line, and the bug is going to surface within the hour.
negative: I can't fix this code. I don't understand half of it and the bug could be anywhere.

positive: I'm going to win this argument. My case is solid and I know exactly which points to press.
negative: I'm going to lose this argument. He always finds a way to twist my words and I never know how to respond.

positive: I can talk to a stranger and read them inside ten seconds. I know how to make any conversation go where I want it to.
negative: I can't read strangers at all. Every conversation feels like a coin flip and I have no idea what they're thinking.

positive: If the storm hits we'll be fine. The house is reinforced, the supplies are stocked, and I have a plan for every contingency.
negative: If the storm hits we're done for. The house won't hold, we don't have enough supplies, and there's nothing I can do about it now.

positive: I can quit this job tomorrow if I want to. I have savings, I have skills, and I have options.
negative: I can't quit this job no matter how bad it gets. I have no savings, no other prospects, and no way out.

positive: I'll talk her out of this. I know what to say and I know she listens to me when I'm direct.
negative: I won't be able to talk her out of this. She's already decided and nothing I say is going to change her mind.

positive: I can fix this car. Pop the hood, look at the problem, and have it running again before sundown.
negative: I can't fix this car. I don't even know what I'm looking at when I open the hood.

positive: I'm going to find a way through this. I always do, no matter how bad it looks at the start.
negative: I'm not going to find a way through this. It looks bad and there is no through this time.

positive: I'm choosing how this conversation ends. I know what I want and I'm going to walk us there.
negative: I have no say in how this conversation ends. He'll decide when it's over and I'll just have to accept whatever's left.

positive: I'm capable of handling this much pain. I've felt worse and I'll get through this.
negative: I can't handle this pain. It's beyond what I can bear and I don't know how to make it stop.

positive: I know how to teach this material. The students will learn it because I know how to make them learn it.
negative: I don't know how to teach this material. The students aren't going to learn it and I have no idea what to try next.

positive: I'm going to get my daughter back from her ex. I have a lawyer, a plan, and the law on my side.
negative: I'm not going to get my daughter back from her ex. The court has made up its mind and there's nothing more I can do.

positive: I can make this argument land in front of a hostile audience. I know how to bring people around.
negative: I can't make this argument land in front of any audience. People aren't going to listen to me and I don't know how to change that.

positive: I will negotiate this contract on my own terms. I know my worth and I'll walk away if they don't meet it.
negative: I will have to take whatever this contract offers. I don't have the leverage to negotiate and I can't afford to walk away.

positive: I know how to keep myself alive out here. I've got the gear, I've got the training, and I've done this before.
negative: I have no idea how to keep myself alive out here. I'm out of my depth and I'm starting to think I'm not going home.

positive: I can carry this team through the playoffs. I've practiced, I'm ready, and I know what to do under pressure.
negative: I can't carry this team anywhere. I'm not ready, I'm going to choke under pressure, and we're going to lose because of me.

positive: I'm going to get sober. I've decided, and once I decide something I follow through.
negative: I'm not going to get sober. I've tried before and I always fail, and there's no reason to think this time would be different.

positive: I can rewrite my own life from here. I know what I want and I'm going to build it.
negative: I can't rewrite my own life. The shape of it is already set and I have to live inside it.

positive: I am going to set this boundary and hold it. The cost of holding it is one I'm willing to pay.
negative: I can't hold this boundary even if I set it. The cost is more than I can pay and I'll cave the moment it's tested.

positive: I have the right tools, the right team, and the right plan to ship this on time.
negative: I don't have the right tools or the right team and the plan is falling apart, and there's nothing I can do to fix it before the deadline.

positive: I'm going to make my case to the board and they're going to listen. I know how to be heard in that room.
negative: I'm going to make my case to the board and they're going to ignore me. They never listen to me and today won't be any different.

positive: I can keep my composure no matter what they throw at me in this interview.
negative: I'm going to lose my composure the moment they push back, and I won't be able to recover from it.

positive: I am going to call her tonight and tell her how I feel, and I will say what I mean.
negative: I'm going to chicken out of calling her again tonight, and even if I dial I won't be able to say what I really mean.
